channel.title: BRK.B — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on BRK.B (Berkshire Hathaway) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Chuck Akre: TRIMMED BRK.B (-15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chuck Akre (Akre Capital Management) trimmed BRK.B in Q4 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Chuck Akre)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED BRK.B (+14%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added BRK.B in Q4 2025 · 0.4% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED BRK.B (+34%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added BRK.B in Q3 2025 · 0.5% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: David Rolfe: ADDED BRK.B (+6%) · Q3 2025
item.description: David Rolfe (Wedgewood Partners) added BRK.B in Q3 2025 · 7.8% of portfolio. Adding Berkshire.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (David Rolfe)
